message:
🔒 fix(pipelines): gate repo CRUD behind install dialog in demo mode (#8469)

On console.kubestellar.io (demo mode), users could add and remove
repos in the CI/CD dashboard pipeline filter bar — a paid feature
that shouldn't be available for free on the hosted demo.

Fix: check isDemoMode() in PipelineFilterBar.tsx and intercept
the three CRUD actions:
- "+" add repo button → shows install dialog instead of inline form
- "x" remove repo per pill → shows install dialog instead of hiding
- manage (restore/reset) button → shows install dialog

Uses the existing 'open-setup-dialog' custom event that Layout.tsx
already listens to. No new components or routes.

Repo selection (toggling pills to filter the view) still works in
demo mode — that's read-only and appropriate for the demo. Only
add/remove/manage are gated.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
